title: bank of england / balance sheet / weekly report | Balance Sheet Update | Bank of England Weekly Report 8 April 2026
summary: The Bank of England published its weekly balance sheet data as of 8 April 2026, showing reserves balances at £650,510mn (up from £645,085mn a week prior). Key movements include a £5,425mn increase in reserves balances, a £2,860mn rise in short-term repo operations to £100,301mn, and a £1,409mn increase in indexed long-term repo to £74,183mn. Foreign currency reserve assets declined by £1,452mn to £16,368mn.
